name: tesseron
description: MCP gateway that lets any web app expose typed actions to Claude over WebSocket — no browser automation — plus a framework skill with eleven progressive-disclosure references (actions, resources, context, transports, react, protocol, schemas, errors, gateway, testing, project-structure), an `tesseron-dev` skill that picks the right consumer package (`@tesseron/react` for React, `/server` for Node, `/web` for any other browser context) and inserts the canonical API at the project's entry point, and isolated-context explorer/reviewer subagents for building and auditing Tesseron codebases.
